title: Dropdown menu shows up in annoying places
excerpt: the box for the dropdown can’t be moved to a more convenient place, when there are a lot of itens - some of them just don’t show in the screen and there is no way to scroll to them.

posts.author: Yasmin-m (yasmin mazur)
posts.cookedHtml:
מתחרים זוגלובק בישראל - סלמי מהדרין - Google Chrome756×978 119 KB

the box for the dropdown can’t be moved to a more convenient place, when there are a lot of itens - some of them just don’t show in the screen and there is no way to scroll to them.
